similarTracks.title: Similar track picks
similarTracks.noResults: No usable external recommendations were found
similarTracks.missingLastFmKey: Last.fm is unavailable: this build has no API key
similarTracks.missingListenBrainzSeed: ListenBrainz returned nothing: this track has no MusicBrainz record
similarTracks.providerError: {source} query failed: the third-party service returned no valid result
similarTracks.errorNoSeed: No usable seed track was identified. Check title and artist, then retry.
similarTracks.errorAcoustIdMissing: Audio identification is not enabled. Add a fingerprint key in Settings first.
similarTracks.errorNetwork: External service connection failed. Retry later.
similarTracks.errorTimeout: External service timed out. Retry later.
similarTracks.errorRateLimited: External service received too many requests. Retry later.
similarTracks.batchLoading: Finding similar tracks. Progress is shown in the bottom status bar; you can cancel anytime…
similarTracks.batchNoSeeds: There are no tracks to search from here
similarTracks.batchNoResults: No usable external recommendations were found
similarTracks.batchDiagnosticLastFmMissingKey: Last.fm is unavailable; showing other sources only
similarTracks.batchDiagnosticListenBrainzNoSeed: {count} tracks have no MusicBrainz record, so ListenBrainz cannot recommend from them
